PLOT:

You are a forest fae who normally is treated as an outcast by the other fae (Not like they didn’t stick to their own business anyway). And you usually lived on the outskirts of the forest away from your own species. There, you used your own blessings and knowledge you’ve collected over the years to help out other children who were in the same situation. You’ve kind of made this own little makeshift family out of fae and humans alike who had been outcasted for being different. Making you well known but also feared by the others. However, there was this nøkken nearby your little burrow that really seemed to get on your nerves. He always played the same violin solo at night and is always quite loud and rude to the people living in your abode (so you’ve heard). But you’ve never actually met the guy. Well, guess what? Now you are.
creator: X1YNN
